parameters.query: SELECT id, ctwa_clid, phone, ad_id, ad_name, campaign_id, campaign_name, conversion_value, clicked_at FROM fact_ctwa_clicks WHERE contact_id IS NULL ORDER BY clicked_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT contact_id, location_id FROM dim_contacts WHERE phone = $1 AND is_current = TRUE LIMIT 1
SELECT conversation_id FROM dim_conversations WHERE contact_id = $1 AND is_current = TRUE ORDER BY ghl_created_at DESC LIMIT 1
UPDATE fact_ctwa_clicks SET contact_id = $1, conversation_id = $2, location_id = $3 WHERE ctwa_clid = $4 AND contact_id IS NULL
SELECT opportunity_id, monetary_value, currency FROM dim_opportunities WHERE contact_id = $1 AND status = 'won' AND is_current = TRUE AND capi_sent_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
UPDATE fact_ctwa_clicks SET capi_sent_at = NOW(), capi_event_id = $1, capi_payload = $2, converted_to_opp_id = $3, converted_at = NOW() WHERE ctwa_clid = $4
